stemHtml:
An aircraft has just been refuelled. The aircraft Operations Manual states that the allowable difference between loaded fuel and indicated fuel is ±5% of the total tank capacity.
Given:

Total fuel tank capacity: 1100 kg 
Fuel on board before refuelling: 260 kg 
Fuel indication after refuelling: 980 kg 
Fuel added (fuel receipt): 900 L 
Fuel density: 0.772 kg/L

Which statement regarding the indicated fuel quantity is correct?

options.a: Fuel indication is within tolerance but needs to be reported for trend monitoring.
options.c: Outside tolerance and needs to be verified with dipstick.
options.d: Outside tolerance and tank needs to be emptied.
